textByHash.1752c82376d368ccbf471ac3cc43c0470626d0d4: So how are you doing getting me my perfect gold jewelry?
textByHash.3794f7e79782f9e1586f4cf3d6a84e40de1aee9c: I know how you feel... for such a long time I have searched and searched for the elusive perfect gold... I thought I had gotten a good lead on finding it
textByHash.6608781943e586607e759b175b0512ab5e7974ef: when I heard talk of a dwarven expert on gold named Boot some time back, but unfortunately for me, he has returned to his mountain home, which I cannot find.
textByHash.db4c4c95c4421c4fc63e8226dc42527368ae86b8: So how are you doing making me my perfect gold jewelry?
textByHash.49ece66f98423a3217808381a678e919481be0c9: Well, I won't entrust you with my piece of the crest until you have brought me a necklace of perfect gold with a red precious stone, and a perfect gold ring to match.
textByHash.371a80ba010ce56f861d27f906ccf357bc237b5c: These... these are exquisite! EXACTLY what I was searching for all of this time! Please, take my crest fragment!
textByHash.46571a00b1ef7bb026fbf21f12a1cd11b1b253e8: Now, I suppose you will be wanting to find my brother Johnathon who is in possession of the final piece of the family's crest?
textByHash.64155594d8a6bd14f4969c74b330fe762d44f85f: Well, the last I heard of my brother Johnathon, he was studying the magical arts, and trying to hunt some demon or other out in The Wilderness.
textByHash.d4685605346f1ebcee3e46eb49c6202527cb3bbf: Unsurprisingly, I do not believe he is doing a particularly good job of things, and spends most of his time recovering from his injuries in
textByHash.f81fc832a5255073694c826a40f63d460ae33113: some tavern or other near the edge of The Wilderness. You'll probably find him still there.
textByHash.25f5adae9f052adcf2f81aa76cd74e5377fb441e: Greetings again, adventurer. How are you doing on retrieving the crest pieces?
textByHash.0e8dc1af417bc02dbef93b630ca9e2573784e79c: I hope you succeed for my father's sake.
textByHash.c888364386c2638cd57872eee70a5a606ce7d417: I have a confession myself adventurer... I did not fully trust you with the actual part of my family's crest before, and gave you a worthless replica before...
textByHash.61c3cdec15f2c1f6a5b86c1a967a06a24ee689ab: In hindsight, it seems I was right. I will give you the real piece now, but PLEASE try not to lose it; it is a priceless family heirloom.
textByHash.1e49322e6f011ef5f19533a740dcfa49d02bab1c: Very well done adventurer! Now please return it to my father!
textByHash.888e31e4e1e1cfafa0cea6a9ab104fe34ca08b21: I have received word from my father of your assistance to our family in this matter. You have my thanks for restoring our honour.
textByHash.b9fe0b33c405f46fe885d7ce96270d97a4989d1f: Indeed I can. In my long time searching for the 'perfect' gold I learned a lot about gold items. I can improve these gauntlets so that they provide more than normal
textByHash.eb866469c53dd46c0d620d90ccf34099479c64d1: experience when smithing gold. I can easily modify these for you.
textByHash.6ed13ec3fb0a392fecab5bd4e077b2bc42876579: If you feel you really must consort with the likes of them. I await your decision.
textByHash.8785d49277167880f0d8faf339fd2e8ba2758cb6: Yes well... Is there anything I can help you with?
textByHash.59181542a13364f5c104c0269c07a3efdbefd325: Yes certainly, though it will cost you 25,000 coins.
textByHash.75ea357bff0d2450ec6f0d5eba7f284ec3efc839: I have received word from my father that you assisted us again! I get the feeling you weren't going to stop trying until you did though.
textByHash.2dc73ddbdf6e0eef05372c12c2e7604238fe719b: As a token of my appreciation, I will happily forge you as many pairs of Goldsmith gauntlets as you desire.
textByHash.9d7fac62cd456babd38b62ac9a2f7a2d61cca7e2: You will find the rate you gain experience when smelting gold much improved whilst wearing these gauntlets.
textByHash.9db4dab627d4ffffc122ddf0d2ece21108402df5: Honestly , everything is fantastic! What you did for me and my family is amazing. My lady was very impressed with the perfect jewellery you obtained for me!
textByHash.0bac5efdf8262f0245e00dce1f44b2d018a74f4f: I couldn't bring myself to trouble you any further . Thank you for everything, but I am content.
